log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 10 damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: 57/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: 30/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 30/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tiefling — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: 12/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 27 damage. Tiefling — Unarmored Caster HP: -15/67
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
